title: AMP LAB TO-DO List
content:
AMP LAB TO-DO List

write up themed workshop descriptions
kick off event (first event)





Hello! My name is Anthony Padavano. I am a 2nd year MFA student specializing in Fiction, the English Department’s tech guru (I did not award myself this title, mind you)—and, I am also your AMP Lab Assistant!

During Drop-In Hours (listed above), I will be available to help students and faculty without an appointment. If you feel you have a particularly difficult task that needs handling, I’d recommend you email me ([REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]) first so I can make sure I’ve brushed up on whatever information needed in order for me to assist you.

I specialize in OS X, coding (html, css, js), Microsoft Office, Adobe Suite, and learning programs quickly.
context: From document: AMP LAB TO-DO List
